description_long: This is a traditional hammer with a wooden handle and a metal head, designed for striking and shaping materials. The handle is slightly curved, showing a natural wood grain and some visible wear, suggesting frequent use. The head is a classic ball-peen type, featuring a rounded peen on one side and a flat striking face on the other, both showing signs of use and minor surface imperfections. The wood appears weathered and aged, with a matte, rough finish and some discoloration. The metal head has a dull, slightly oxidized appearance, lacking any visible polish or shine. No branding, logos, or additional attachments are visible on the hammer.
description: A well-used ball-peen hammer with a curved wooden handle and a worn, metal head. The surfaces show signs of age and use, with a rough, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the ball-peen hammer head with both the rounded and flat faces visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the profile of the hammer head, with the rounded peen more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the hammer, again showing both the rounded and flat faces of the head and the handle's curvature.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, emphasizing the handle's width and the flat striking face of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, rough texture, and no additional grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with one rounded peen and one flat striking face, made of metal.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible wear on the handle, minor surface imperfections and discoloration on the head, no major damage.
